updateNote: Day 52 12:20 PM PT refresh: Trump pushes Macron for French Navy deployment to Hormuz. Iran FM Araghchi declares US 'not serious' — no Round 2 talks while blockade continues. IDF units within kilometers of Bint Jbeil in southern Lebanon. Iran parliament drafting Hormuz transit fees/ban bill for hostile-flag vessels. Oil surging toward $100 (Brent $95.42). Trump tells NewsNation ceasefire extension 'highly unlikely.' Netanyahu with Milei: 'war not over.' Ceasefire expires April 22 — 48h out. Gas $4.076.
dataFreshnessWarning: Data updated as of 12:20 PM PDT April 20, 2026 (Day 52 afternoon). Trump-Macron pressure, Iran parliament Hormuz bill, IDF near Bint Jbeil, diplomacy at standstill. Ceasefire expires April 22.
